nasb.text: “You and Eleazar the priest and the heads of the fathers’ households of the congregation take a count of the booty that was captured, both of man and of animal;

esv.text: “Take the count of the plunder that was taken, both of man and of beast, you and Eleazar the priest and the heads of the fathers’ houses of the congregation,

cnv.text: “你和以利亞撒祭司，以及會眾的各族長，要計算俘擄的人和掠得的牲畜的總數。

ccb.text: “你和以利亚撒祭司以及会众的各族长要统计俘虏和牲畜的数目，
